TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ynna dming-ding [kmæih-kahier] alei ka assikamou ding-ding-auh [kmæih-kahier.]
Ynna dming-ding [kmæih-kahier] alei ka assikamou ding-ding-auh [kmæih-kahier.]
S.TRANS: eN oordeelt niet op dat ghp niet geoordeelt en wor dt.
Judge not, that ye be not judged.
「你們不要論斷人，免得你們被論斷。

S.FORM: Ka tou dading-ding-en ki mamang ni-dming-ding-kamou, dingding-auh-kamou-rå: ka tou rarpung-en ki mamang ka nirmarpung-kamou, rarpung-auh-kamou-rå.
Ka tou dading-ding-en ki mamang ni-dming-ding-kamou, dingding-auh-kamou-rå: ka tou rarpung-en ki mamang ka nirmarpung-kamou, rarpung-auh-kamou-rå.
S.TRANS: Want Want met welck oordeel ghy oordeelc suit ghy geoordeelt worden : endemet welcke mate ghy metet sal u weder ghemetenworden,
For with what judgment ye judge, ye shall be judged: and with what measure ye mete, it shall be measured to you again.
因為你們怎樣論斷人，也必怎樣被論斷；你們用甚麼量器量給人，也必用甚麼量器量給你們。

S.FORM: Ka kaumang ka k'ita-enhou ta houka ka tou matta ki tæ'iapara oho, râ ælogh [ka pærænæh] ka tou matta oho assi ymhou pou-liliht-in?
Ka kaumang ka k'ita-enhou ta houka ka tou matta ki tæ'iapara oho, râ ælogh [ka pærænæh] ka tou matta oho assi ymhou pou-liliht-in?
S.TRANS: Endewatsiet ghy den fplinter die in de ooghe uwes broeders is maer den balck dieinuwe ooge is en mercke niet
And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but considerest not the beam that is in thine own eye?
為甚麼看見你弟兄眼中有刺，卻不想自己眼中有樑木呢？

S.FORM: Nda mattai-mam-ah-kow ki mang ki tæi-appara oho, hamiau-mau ta houka tou matta oho, ka kyttei, akou-ælogh tou mattaoho?
Nda mattai-mam-ah-kow ki mang ki tæi-appara oho, hamiau-mau ta houka tou matta oho, ka kyttei, akou-ælogh tou mattaoho?
S.TRANS: Of hoe sult ghp tor uwen broeder seggen laet toe dat ick den splinter uyt uw' goge uyt doe ende siet daer ts cen balck in uwe ooghes
Or how wilt thou say to thy brother, Let me pull out the mote out of thine eye; and, behold, a beam is in thine own eye?
你自己眼中有樑木，怎能對你弟兄說：『容我去掉你眼中的刺』呢？

S.FORM: [Ymhou ka] pa-nni-nni-en ki rÿh ki sou, ha-aurou-auta alogh tou matta-oho, dou-miaka mara-rauah-kow ki 'ææu-matta-au'mhou ta houka tou matta ki tæi-apara-oho.
[Ymhou ka] pa-nni-nni-en ki rÿh ki sou, ha-aurou-auta alogh tou matta-oho, dou-miaka mara-rauah-kow ki 'ææu-matta-au'mhou ta houka tou matta ki tæi-apara-oho.
S.TRANS: Ghy gebepnsde doet eesst den balck uyt uw' ooge ende dan sult ghy befien om den splinte uyt uwes broeders ooge uyt te doen.
Thou hypocrite, first cast out the beam out of thine own eye; and then shalt thou see clearly to cast out the mote out of thy brother's eye.
你這假冒為善的人！先去掉自己眼中的樑木，然後才能看得清楚，去掉你弟兄眼中的刺。

S.FORM: Ynna pia tou affou-affou-an ki ni-pa-sa-nni tou tatamd-en ki Alid, ynna maring ta vahto-oumi ka tæi-qua tou koudo smaki-qua tou kavou-youlou-an, alei ka assi hmitgid-ah ki anna ki na kourkour nein, ka dou ni-mǣeu-vering kmavys-ah ymoumi-æn-ra.

Ynna pia tou affou-affou-an ki ni-pa-sa-nni tou tatamd-en ki Alid, ynna maring ta vahto-oumi ka tæi-qua tou koudo smaki-qua tou kavou-youlou-an, alei ka assi hmitgid-ah ki anna ki na kourkour nein, ka dou ni-mǣeu-vering kmavys-ah ymoumi-æn-ra.
S.TRANS: En get het heylige den honden niet noch en werpt uwe peerlen niet boor de swynen : op dat sy niet t:eenigher tydt deselbe met hare boeten en bertreden ende [haec] omKeerendeu en berscheuren, :
Give not that which is holy unto the dogs, neither cast ye your pearls before swine, lest they trample them under their feet, and turn again and rend you.
不要把聖物給狗，也不要把你們的珍珠丟在豬前，恐怕牠踐踏了珍珠，轉過來咬你們。」 （路11‧9－13）

S.FORM: Tmoumimi-â, ka 'pæ-eih-kamou: kmi-ym-â ka ma-ki-valeiah-kamou: tmubtib-â ka 'ǣæulbeih-kamou.
Tmoumimi-â, ka 'pæ-eih-kamou: kmi-ym-â ka ma-ki-valeiah-kamou: tmubtib-â ka 'ǣæulbeih-kamou.
S.TRANS: Bidbet endeu sal gegeben worden : soecket nde ghy sult binden:kloppet endeusal open gedaen worden.
Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you:
「你們祈求，就給你們；尋找，就尋見；叩門，就給你們開門。

S.FORM: Ka timamang ta tmoumimia, mara ta teni: [timamang] ta kma-kmakiym, maki-yalei ta teni: [timamang] ka tmubtub, 'ǣæulb-eih ta teni.
Ka timamang ta tmoumimia, mara ta teni: [timamang] ta kma-kmakiym, maki-yalei ta teni: [timamang] ka tmubtub, 'ǣæulb-eih ta teni.
S.TRANS: Want een yege lick die bidt die ontfanght: ende die soeckt foeckt die bindt : ende die Klopt diensal open gedaen worden.
For every one that asketh receiveth; and he that seeketh findeth; and to him that knocketh it shall be opened.
因為凡祈求的，就得着；尋找的，就尋見；叩門的，就給他開門。

S.FORM: Timang lava ymoumi-æn, ka rou tmoumimia tyni-æn ta alak tyn ki paoul, p'æ-eih tyn kana ki vahto?
Timang lava ymoumi-æn, ka rou tmoumimia tyni-æn ta alak tyn ki paoul, p'æ-eih tyn kana ki vahto?
S.TRANS: Otfte wat menche isle; onde} u soo stjn fone hem soude bidden om broodt die hem eenen fteen sal gebens
Or what man is there of you, whom if his son ask bread, will he give him a stone?
你們中間誰有兒子求餅，反給他石頭呢？

S.FORM: Ka rou tmoumimia lava tyni-æn ki thing, pæ-eil-ato tyn kaua ki na voelei?
Ka rou tmoumimia lava tyni-æn ki thing, pæ-eil-ato tyn kaua ki na voelei?
S.TRANS: Ende soo hy hem om een bisch soude bidden die hemeen slanghesal geben #
Or if he ask a fish, will he give him a serpent?
求魚，反給他蛇呢？

S.FORM: Heriou mavana-kamou ta ymoumi ka ma't-e ki kidi hmariou ki alalak-oumi ki pæp-æp-æ ka mariang, assi kaua pæ'ǣ-saoun-ah ta Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum, pæ'ǣ-ouryf ki riang neini-æn ka tmoumimia tyni-æn?

Heriou mavana-kamou ta ymoumi ka ma't-e ki kidi hmariou ki alalak-oumi ki pæp-æp-æ ka mariang, assi kaua pæ'ǣ-saoun-ah ta Raraman-oumi ka tou tounnoun ki vullu-vullum, pæ'ǣ-ouryf ki riang neini-æn ka tmoumimia tyni-æn?
S.TRANS: Indien dan ghy [ die boos zijt weet uwe kinderen goede gabente gheben hoe beel te meer sal uwe Vader die in be Hemelen 1s goede ben] geben den genen diese ban hem bidden. .
If ye then, being evil, know how to give good gifts unto your children, how much more shall your Father which is in heaven give good things to them that ask him?
你們雖然不好，尚且知道拿好東西給兒女，何況你們在天上的父，豈不更把好東西給求他的人嗎？

S.FORM: Annataymmidki mamang ka kamoei-'noumi ka paämt-tin ymoumi-æn ki taou, atta ta paamtau-moumi neini-æn-da: Ka kmahynna ta na Tatouhko ki na Tama-niattæi-tan-appa.
Annataymmidki mamang ka kamoei-'noumi ka paämt-tin ymoumi-æn ki taou, atta ta paamtau-moumi neini-æn-da: Ka kmahynna ta na Tatouhko ki na Tama-niattæi-tan-appa.
S.TRANS: Alle [dingen] dan die ghp wilt dat u de menschen fouden doen doet ghy hen oock alsoo-: Want dat is de Wer ende de Propheten.
Therefore all things whatsoever ye would that men should do to you, do ye even so to them: for this is the law and the prophets.
所以，無論何事，你們願意人怎樣待你們，你們也要怎樣待人，因為這就是律法和先知的道理。」 （路13‧24）

S.FORM: Sa-rarbo-a tou nḡataf ka malyngud: alei ka mahæu-ei ta nḡataf, ka mahai-jahei ta darang ka pa-sahka-quan tou si-dada'n, ka mabatoung ta sa-rarbo ki anna.
Sa-rarbo-a tou nḡataf ka malyngud: alei ka mahæu-ei ta nḡataf, ka mahai-jahei ta darang ka pa-sahka-quan tou si-dada'n, ka mabatoung ta sa-rarbo ki anna.
S.TRANS: Gaett in door de enge poorte: want wijdt is de poorte ende byeedt 1s de weg die tot het berderflepdt} ende bele 3ynder die door den felben ingaen.
Enter ye in at the strait gate: for wide is the gate, and broad is the way, that leadeth to destruction, and many there be which go in thereat:
「你們要進窄門。因為引到滅亡，那門是寬的，路是大的，進去的人也多；

S.FORM: Ka masi-idd ta nḡataf, ka malyng-udd ta darang ka paouhkaquan tou kæuag-han, ka matityng ta maki-valei ki anna.
Ka masi-idd ta nḡataf, ka malyng-udd ta darang ka paouhkaquan tou kæuag-han, ka matityng ta maki-valei ki anna.
S.TRANS: Want de poorte enge inde de wegh is nacuw' die tot het leben leydc ende weynighe zijnder die den selben binden.
Because strait is the gate, and narrow is the way, which leadeth unto life, and few there be that find it.
引到永生，那門是窄的，路是小的，找着的人也少。」 （路6‧43－44）

S.FORM: Râ Saou-kavier-â ki mattæi-tan mattæi-harang ka iroua ymoumi-æn tou pamammi-'en ka na jocko, râ tou-rbo-appa [mamaki] kmkakan joekko ta neni.
Râ Saou-kavier-â ki mattæi-tan mattæi-harang ka iroua ymoumi-æn tou pamammi-'en ka na jocko, râ tou-rbo-appa [mamaki] kmkakan joekko ta neni.
S.TRANS: Matr Maet wacht [u] ban de balsche Propheten de welcke in ichaeps-kleederen tot u komen 1matr ban binnen zijn fe grpende wolben.
Beware of false prophets, which come to you in sheep's clothing, but inwardly they are ravening wolves.
「你們要防備假先知。他們到你們這裏來，外面披着羊皮，裏面卻是殘暴的狼。

S.FORM: K'alang-au-moumi ta neni tou voua nein-ra. Pia-sâl-en kaua pihtygh ta karæumætæh tou adad-dum-an? ki kamaija lava tou eyhg-au-an?
K'alang-au-moumi ta neni tou voua nein-ra. Pia-sâl-en kaua pihtygh ta karæumætæh tou adad-dum-an? ki kamaija lava tou eyhg-au-an?
S.TRANS: Aen hare byuchten sult ghy-fe kennen. Leeftmen oock een druybe ban doornen of bpghen ban disteen s
Ye shall know them by their fruits. Do men gather grapes of thorns, or figs of thistles?
憑着他們的果子，就可以認出他們來。荊棘上豈能摘葡萄呢？蒺藜裏豈能摘無花果呢？

S.FORM: K'ma-appa hynna ymmid ki pærænnæh ka mariang makkavoua ki voua ka mariang, pærænnæh ka assi mariang makka-voua ki voua ka assi mariang.
K'ma-appa hynna ymmid ki pærænnæh ka mariang makkavoua ki voua ka mariang, pærænnæh ka assi mariang makka-voua ki voua ka assi mariang.
S.TRANS: Aioo cen yeder goede boom brenght boort goede buuchten ende een quade boom brenghe boort quade bruchten,
Even so every good tree bringeth forth good fruit; but a corrupt tree bringeth forth evil fruit.
這樣，凡好樹都結好果子，惟獨壞樹結壞果子。

S.FORM: Assi hmahei makka-voua ta pærænnæh ka mariang ki voua ka assi mariang: pærænnæh-appa ka assi mariang [assi hmahei] makka-voua ki voua ka mariang.
Assi hmahei makka-voua ta pærænnæh ka mariang ki voua ka assi mariang: pærænnæh-appa ka assi mariang [assi hmahei] makka-voua ki voua ka mariang.
S.TRANS: Een goede boom en Kan geen quade byuchten boort brenghen : noch een quade boom goede bruchten boort brengen.
A good tree cannot bring forth evil fruit, neither can a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit.
好樹不能結壞果子；壞樹不能結好果子。

S.FORM: Ymmid ki pærænnæh k'assi makka-voua ki voua ka mariang tætætæ-en-ato ka-aryng-ato tou apoei-ra.
Ymmid ki pærænnæh k'assi makka-voua ki voua ka mariang tætætæ-en-ato ka-aryng-ato tou apoei-ra.
S.TRANS: Een pede boom die â€š Fheen goede bjucht boort en brengt wort uptgehouwen ende in t byer geworpen.
Every tree that bringeth not forth good fruit is hewn down, and cast into the fire.
凡不結好果子的樹就砍下來，丟在火裏。

S.FORM: Anna ta k'alang-au-moumi tou voua nyn ta neni.
Anna ta k'alang-au-moumi tou voua nyn ta neni.
S.TRANS: Soo ult ghy dan deselbe aen hare byuchten kennen.
Wherefore by their fruits ye shall know them.
所以，憑着他們的果子就可以認出他們來。」 （路13‧25－27）

S.FORM: Assi sa-rarbo-ah tou Peisasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum ta mæi-bouvoual ka ma-nanang jau-an Meirang, Meirang: râ dyk tyni-æn ka ahqua ki kamoei-in ti Rama-au ka æ'iä-tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
Assi sa-rarbo-ah tou Peisasou-an ki tounnoun ki vullu-vullum ta mæi-bouvoual ka ma-nanang jau-an Meirang, Meirang: râ dyk tyni-æn ka ahqua ki kamoei-in ti Rama-au ka æ'iä-tounnoun ki vullu-vullum.
S.TRANS: Niet ten pegelick die tot my segt Heere Heere en sal ingaen in het Koninckrijcke der Hemelen : mae! die. daer doet den wille mijns Dadegs diein de Demelen is.
Not every one that saith unto me, Lord, Lord, shall enter into the kingdom of heaven; but he that doeth the will of my Father which is in heaven.
「凡稱呼我『主啊，主啊』的人不能都進天國；惟獨遵行我天父旨意的人才能進去。

S.FORM: Mabatoung ta kmæ'igh k'maah-hynna ki sou, Meirang, Meirang, assi-kame kaua ni-mattæi-tan tou Nanang oho, assi-kame kaua ni-padarang tou Nanang oho ki Lyttou, assi-kame kaua ni-meiring-ei-appa tou Nanang oho ki madagh ki ringei ki kailh-en.

Mabatoung ta kmæ'igh k'maah-hynna ki sou, Meirang, Meirang, assi-kame kaua ni-mattæi-tan tou Nanang oho, assi-kame kaua ni-padarang tou Nanang oho ki Lyttou, assi-kame kaua ni-meiring-ei-appa tou Nanang oho ki madagh ki ringei ki kailh-en.
S.TRANS: Dele culten ten dien dage tot my leggen Pn Heere n hebben wp niet in uwen Name geprophetee:t ende in uwen Name Duybelen uytgeworpen ende in uwen Name bele krachten gedaen
Many will say to me in that day, Lord, Lord, have we not prophesied in thy name? and in thy name have cast out devils? and in thy name done many wonderful works?
當那日必有許多人對我說：『主啊，主啊，我們不是奉你的名傳道，奉你的名趕鬼，奉你的名行許多異能嗎？』

S.FORM: Ka tou kidi kanna mattæi-pænæh-ah-koh ki sou neini-an, Myhkaqua assi-mau-kamou ni-k'alang-en, d'marang-â jau-an ymoumi ka mapoungas [miroung] tou katoukoul-an.
Ka tou kidi kanna mattæi-pænæh-ah-koh ki sou neini-an, Myhkaqua assi-mau-kamou ni-k'alang-en, d'marang-â jau-an ymoumi ka mapoungas [miroung] tou katoukoul-an.
S.TRANS: Endedan salick haer opentlick aensegghen Ick en hebbe u noyt ghekent. Gaet wech ban my ghy die de ongherechtigheydt wdesrckt.
And then will I profess unto them, I never knew you: depart from me, ye that work iniquity.
我就明明地告訴他們說：『我從來不認識你們，你們這些作惡的人，離開我去吧！』」 （路6‧46－49）

S.FORM: Anna ta ymmid ki mæi'-bouvoual ka millingigh ki sousou-au k'atta, dou'ahqua, pæhkaulau-l'au-mau tyni æn ki pæræh ka macynnæu, ka ni-mei-ringei ki tallah tyn tou [voukyn ka] vahto.
Anna ta ymmid ki mæi'-bouvoual ka millingigh ki sousou-au k'atta, dou'ahqua, pæhkaulau-l'au-mau tyni æn ki pæræh ka macynnæu, ka ni-mei-ringei ki tallah tyn tou [voukyn ka] vahto.
S.TRANS: Een yeghelick dan die dese mijne woorden hoort ende deselbe doet dien sal ick bergelicken bp cen boorsichtigh man die syn huys op een steenrotre gebouwtheefrc.
Therefore whosoever heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them, I will liken him unto a wise man, which built his house upon a rock:
「所以，凡聽見我這話就去行的，好比一個聰明人，把房子蓋在磐石上；

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-rarim ta dumdum, ka ni-iroua ta vaha, ni-bavare ta vare ka ni-smiryf ki tallah k'anna, ka assi ni-matubda, alei ka ni-'ærag-han ki vahto-ra.
Ka ni-mou-rarim ta dumdum, ka ni-iroua ta vaha, ni-bavare ta vare ka ni-smiryf ki tallah k'anna, ka assi ni-matubda, alei ka ni-'ærag-han ki vahto-ra.
S.TRANS: Ende dae is flaghregen nede: geballen ende de water hoomen zijn ghekomen ende de winden hebben gewaeyt] ende zijn tegen het selbe hups aengeballe efi het ens niet geballen want het was op de lteencotre gegront.
And the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell not: for it was founded upon a rock.
雨淋，水沖，風吹，撞着那房子，房子總不倒塌，因為根基立在磐石上。

S.FORM: Ka ymmud ki mæ'i-boä-youal ka millingigh ki sousou-au k'atta, dou assi ahqua, pæhkaul-aul'aul-ato ki pæræh ka rmapou-rapou, ka ni-mei-ring-ei ki tallah tyn tou li'igh.
Ka ymmud ki mæ'i-boä-youal ka millingigh ki sousou-au k'atta, dou assi ahqua, pæhkaul-aul'aul-ato ki pæræh ka rmapou-rapou, ka ni-mei-ring-ei ki tallah tyn tou li'igh.
S.TRANS: Ende een yegelick die dese mijne woorden hoordt efi deselbe niet en doet die sal bp eenen dwasen man bergeleken worden die sijn huys op het rant gebouwt heeft.
And every one that heareth these sayings of mine, and doeth them not, shall be likened unto a foolish man, which built his house upon the sand:
凡聽見我這話不去行的，好比一個無知的人，把房子蓋在沙土上；

S.FORM: Ka ni-mou-rarim ta dumdum, ka ni-iroua ta vaha, ni-bavare bavare ta vare, ka ni-smiryf ki tallah kanna, ka ni-matub-da, ka ni-maloäf ta pa-at b-an tyn da.
Ka ni-mou-rarim ta dumdum, ka ni-iroua ta vaha, ni-bavare bavare ta vare, ka ni-smiryf ki tallah kanna, ka ni-matub-da, ka ni-maloäf ta pa-at b-an tyn da.
S.TRANS: Efi de flagh-regen geballen eii de waterstoofiroomen zijn gekomen ende de winden hebben gewaeyt endezijn tegen het selbe hups aengeslagen en het is geballen efi synen bal was groot.
And the rain descended, and the floods came, and the winds blew, and beat upon that house; and it fell: and great was the fall of it.
雨淋，水沖，風吹，撞着那房子，房子就倒塌了，並且倒塌得很大。」

S.FORM: Ka ni-k'mato hynna, ka pat'-kaha'to ta ti Jesus ki sou k'atta, ka ni-innagh ta mako-ilal-aulau alei ki ni-pæhtæutæuuh-en tynda.
Ka ni-k'mato hynna, ka pat'-kaha'to ta ti Jesus ki sou k'atta, ka ni-innagh ta mako-ilal-aulau alei ki ni-pæhtæutæuuh-en tynda.
S.TRANS: Endehetis geschiet als Jesus dese woorden geeyndight hadde { dat] De scharen hae: ontlerteden obe? syne Leere,
And it came to pass, when Jesus had ended these sayings, the people were astonished at his doctrine:
耶穌講完了這些話，眾人都希奇他的教訓；

S.FORM: Alei ka ni-matatæutæuugh neini-æn, mama ki akou-keirang-en ki kidi, assi mama ki Makou-sasoulat. Kouyhpa ki lbægh ki soulat.
Alei ka ni-matatæutæuugh neini-æn, mama ki akou-keirang-en ki kidi, assi mama ki Makou-sasoulat. Kouyhpa ki lbægh ki soulat.
S.TRANS: Want hy leerde hae: als macht hebbende ende niet-als de Schtift-ghcleere.Her achtste Capittel.
For he taught them as one having authority, and not as the scribes.
因為他教訓他們，正像有權柄的人，不像他們的文士。
